creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text: Re: angle brackets, those should just be removed from bhyvectl(8) man page.  Remember that mdoc is semantic markup language, and if you want arguments (.Ar) to be represented as "<argument>" if formatted output (e.g. if you have console that does not support underline), it's the utility that formats man page (e.g. mandoc or whatever is used for web page) that needs to be modified.
